headline: Why Fair Isaac (FICO) Still Looks Moat-Protected Despite Credit-Score Competition
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is one of the best stocks to buy with wide moats. The latest moat-relevant update came on April 28, 2026, when Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) reported fiscal second-quarter revenue of $691.7 million, up 39% year over year, and raised its full-year fiscal 2026 guidance. The company’s Scores segment revenue rose 60% […]

headline: Absa Award Underscores Real World Adoption Of Fair Isaac Fraud Tools
summary: Absa Group Limited won a 2026 FICO Decision Award for fraud prevention and debt collection. The bank used Fair Isaac's Customer Communication Services and Falcon Fraud Manager via WhatsApp to improve fraud containment, efficiency, and customer experience. The recognition highlights the impact of Fair Isaac's technology in a large African banking market. For investors following Fair Isaac (NYSE:FICO), this award spotlights how the company’s credit and fraud tools are being applied in...
